title: China's economic ambitions hit limits to growth as its national congress meets

title: Pentagon dispute bolsters Anthropic reputation but raises questions about AI readiness in military
description: Anthropic’s moral stand on U.S. military use of artificial intelligence is reshaping the competition between leading AI companies but also exposing a growing awareness that maybe chatbots just aren’t capable enough for acts of war. Anthropic’s chatbot, Claude, for the first time outpaced its better-known rival ChatGPT in phone app downloads in the United States this week, a signal of growing interest from consumers siding with Anthropic in its standoff with the Pentagon. But while many military and human rights experts have applauded Amodei for standing up for ethical principles, some are also frustrated by years of AI industry marketing that persuaded the government to apply AI on high-stakes tasks.
content:

title: Report: US Used Anthropic's Claude AI in Iran Attacks
description: The U.S. military used Anthropic's Claude artificial intelligence model in connection with its attack on Iran and continues to use the technology, according to two sources familiar with the matter.
content:
The U.S. military used Anthropic's Claude artificial intelligence model over the weekend in connection with its attack on Iran and continues to use the technology, according to two sources familiar with the matter.

title: X to suspend creators who fail to properly label AI-generated war content
description: X policy now requires disclosure for artificial intelligence-generated armed conflict videos, or creators face 90-day suspension from revenue sharing program.
content:
Creators who post artificial intelligence-generated videos of armed conflicts without clear disclosure will be penalized under new X policies aimed at preventing manipulation and misinformation.
